title: Hii is there a solution for doing an automation to change a status of a column in one board to 'x' if status in another board changes to 'x/y/z'
excerpt:
Hii guys, 
Im trying to do an automation with 2 of my connected boards. I would need to make a status change in a status column in a Board when a status is changes in a status column in another Board. 
Merin

posts.author: SnehaM (Merin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hii guys,

Im trying to do an automation with 2 of my connected boards. I would need to make a status change in a status column in a Board when a status is changes in a status column in another Board.

Merin

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SnehaM

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column and solves this exact use case. Here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-07-13 at 20.26.482132×498 25.4 KB

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - Connected Boards Automations - monday.com App Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SnehaM - check out the template automations under the “Mirror” section in the automations center:

image1833×770 97.2 KB

This one will allow you to change a local status column when a mirrored status changes.

Hope this helps!
Mark
